name: Toffee Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Add the egg yolk, flour, vanilla, and salt to the butter mixture. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
3. Pour the batter into an 8x8 glass baking dish.
4. Microwave at 50% power for 7-8 minutes.
5. Give the dish a half turn twice during cooking by carefully removing it from the microwave and rotating 180 degrees each time.
6. Sprinkle chocolate chips evenly over the top of the bars.
7. Allow the chocolate to soften for about 2 minutes.
8. Spread the softened chocolate chips evenly over the bars using a knife.
9. Sprinkle chopped nuts over the chocolate.
10. Let cool completely before cutting into bars.
